content:
My 5-Year Goals
(Breaking it down further, what does my ideal life look like in five years? Be specific.)

Answer: In 5 years, I will have started my career journey for some time, one that will feel right. One I will be sure is the right one, that I am able to say I’m content with. I have peace in my life, I have strength within myself to do hard things. I will be ok. I will have at least 2 relationships I feel secure in. I am working hard everyday and not feeling so tired all the time. I am living under a roof I don’t feel constant anxiety being under. I can say, I am doing good. I want to be in good shape physically.

My 1-Year Goals
(What key objectives do I want to accomplish in the next 12 months to move toward my 5-year vision?)

Answer: I want to stop feeling so anxious all the time. I want to begin to have confidence in the things I do. The steps I take. I want to follow through with things. I want to begin to stop being a quitter. I want to begin to feel happiness. I want to take action towards my bigger goals of a successful career. I want to get better at working hard. I want to find answers to questions I have, I want to find something that allows me to feel the motivation I lack. I will be going to the gym consistently by the end of this year..
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 3 (chunk 3/29)
